title: Package Manager (Windows)
description: Package manager di Windows: winget, choco (Chocolatey), dan scoop untuk instalasi software.

commands.name: winget
commands.title: winget — Windows Package Manager
commands.description: Package manager resmi Microsoft bawaan Windows 10/11 untuk menginstal dan mengelola software.
commands.examples:
# Cari paket
winget search firefox

# Instal
winget install Mozilla.Firefox
winget install Microsoft.VisualStudioCode
winget install Git.Git

# Instal tanpa prompt
winget install Mozilla.Firefox --accept-package-agreements --accept-source-agreements

# Upgrade semua
winget upgrade --all

# Hapus paket
winget uninstall Mozilla.Firefox

# List terinstal
winget list

# Ekspor/import daftar paket
winget export -o packages.json
winget import -i packages.json

commands.name: choco
commands.title: choco — Chocolatey
commands.description: Package manager populer untuk Windows. Perlu diinstal terpisah dari chocolatey.org.
commands.examples:
# Instal Chocolatey (PowerShell admin)
Set-ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Scope Process -Force; [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [System.Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol -bor 3072; iex ((New-Object System.Net.WebClient).DownloadString('https://community.chocolatey.org/install.ps1'))

# Instal paket
choco install googlechrome -y
choco install nodejs -y
choco install python3 -y

# Upgrade semua
choco upgrade all -y

# Cari paket
choco search editor

# List terinstal
choco list --local-only

# Hapus
choco uninstall paket -y

commands.name: scoop
commands.title: scoop — Scoop Installer
commands.description: Package manager minimalis untuk Windows. Tidak memerlukan admin dan menginstal ke user directory.
commands.examples:
# Instal Scoop
irm get.scoop.sh | iex

# Tambah bucket extras
scoop bucket add extras

# Instal paket
scoop install git
scoop install nodejs
scoop install vscode

# Update semua
scoop update *

# Cari paket
scoop search editor

# Bersihkan versi lama
scoop cleanup *
commands.notes: Scoop menginstal ke ~/scoop/ dan tidak butuh admin. Cocok untuk developer tools.
